rationale: For Romania, the approaching US-Iran deal is the most relevant development via potential energy price relief; the war near Romania's border continues without new escalation.

top_events.title: Iran claims deal with US near; Israel strikes Lebanon
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal could ease energy costs for Romania. Lebanon strikes add Middle East tension but no direct Black Sea or regional security impact.

top_events.title: Gaza post-ceasefire deaths hit 983 as Israeli attack targets refugee camp
top_events.summary: Ongoing Gaza violence is a humanitarian concern but has no direct impact on Romanian daily life or regional security.

top_events.title: Switzerland votes on population cap at 10 million
top_events.summary: Swiss referendum on population cap could marginally affect EU migration patterns, with limited relevance to Romania.
